name: create_memory
description:
Create a new memory in the hub. Title becomes the H1 and the slugified filename.
Filename collisions auto-resolve with -2, -3, ... so two memories can share a title (though you should usually pick a unique one).

Use this for durable cross-conversation context: decisions, project state, "why-it-is-this-way" facts, references to external systems. Do NOT use it as a scratchpad for the current task.

Connect to other memories with `[[Other Title]]` or `[[Other Title|alias]]` inside the body.

title.description: H1 title for the memory. Will also become the slugified filename.

body.description: Optional initial markdown body. If omitted, starts as just "# <title>". Wikilinks should use [[Title]] form. Body should be a self-contained note that makes sense weeks later.

cwd.description: Optional. Absolute path used to discover the hub by walking up for `.bridgememory/`. Defaults to the server's process cwd.
